spells.name: Light
spells.components: V, M (a firefly or phosphorescent moss)
spells.description: You touch one object. Until the spell ends, the object sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.description: A spectral floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. You can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item, or pour out a vial.

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.description: A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 force damage.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.description: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, it takes 1d8 cold damage and its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Minor Illusion
spells.description: You create a sound or an image of an object within range that lasts for the duration. The illusion ends if you dismiss it as an action or cast this spell again.

spells.name: Charm Person
spells.description: You attempt to charm a humanoid you can see within range. It must make a WIS saving throw (with advantage if you or your companions are fighting it). On a fail, it is charmed by you for the duration.

spells.name: Hex
spells.components: V, S, M (the petrified eye of a newt)
spells.description: You curse a creature within range. Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage whenever you hit it with an attack. Also choose one ability — the target has disadvantage on checks with that ability.

classFeatures.name: Healing Hands
classFeatures.description: As an action, touch a creature and restore a number of HP equal to your level. Recharges on a Long Rest.

infoTraits.name: Healing Hands
infoTraits.description: As an action, touch a creature and restore a number of HP equal to your level. Recharges on a Long Rest.

infoTraits.name: Necrotic & Radiant Resistance
infoTraits.description: You have resistance to necrotic damage and radiant damage.

infoTraits.name: Darkvision
infoTraits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You cannot discern colour in darkness.

infoTraits.name: Pact of the Chain
infoTraits.description: You learn the Find Familiar spell and can cast it as a ritual. Your familiar can take the Attack action when you use your action to command it.
